case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. GSA TRANSPORT SERVICES LLC DBA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $431.75 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 75472479) AS TO DEFENDANT GSA TRANSPORT SERVICES LLC DBA GS TRAVEL & LOGISTICS LLC ADBA GS LOGISTICS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GSA TRANSPORT SERVICES LLC DBA GS TRAVEL & LOGISTICS LLC ADBA GS LOGISTICS $13,841.40 PRINCIPAL, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $814.85 INTEREST, $431.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,813.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
